args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, description FROM business_description WHERE description ILIKE '%Los Angeles%' AND (description ILIKE '% CA %' OR description ILIKE '%California%' OR description ILIKE '%, CA%')

args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id

val_args.query: SELECT gmap_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review GROUP BY gmap_id

args.code:
import pandas as pd

la_businesses = pd.DataFrame(env['data_1'])
ratings = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])

merged = pd.merge(la_businesses, ratings, on='gmap_id')
top_5 = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

print(top_5[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict('records'))

import pandas as pd

la_businesses = pd.DataFrame(env['data_1'])
ratings = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])

merged = pd.merge(la_businesses, ratings, on='gmap_id')
top_5 = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False).head(5)

print(top_5[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict('records'))
